command: /gsd:new-project @F:\Directory\FrontierIntelligenceHack\idea.md Configure with: comprehensive depth, parallel execution, commit docs, quality model profile, enable research, plan_check, verifier.

rationale: Roadmap has 7 phases, 49 requirements mapped, 7/7 phases have success criteria
Requirements scoped for phase 1/7: includes all table-stakes features from idea document, Phase 1 — Foundation
Plans approved for phase 1 after plan-checker verification: 3 plans, Phase 1 — Foundation
Execution triggered for phase 1/7: 3 plans ready, 0% overall progress

Verification found blockers: Phase 2: tree-sitter worker thread serialization pattern needs verification — parse trees cannot be transferred via structured clone, only plain-object extracted results; Phase 4: Inference confidence thresholds require calibration against real agent sessions — plan for a calibration period after Phase 4 is functional; Phase 6: Verify whether @dagrejs/dagre is used for initial layout only or replaced entirely by zone-constrained force simulation (affects Phase 6 scope); RESOLVED: Vite 8 (Rolldown-based) stability verified — used successfully in Phase 1 Plan 01. Gap closure needed to resolve these issues before proceeding.
